content:
# Session 25 (iter-025) ‚Äî review summary

## Metadata
- **Lane:** `AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/SerreFiniteness.lean` (S2 ‚Äî finiteness of `H‚Å±(C,ùí™_C(D))`).
- **A prover DID run** ‚Äî the iter-025 plan recorded "no prover dispatch" (hard gate), but the loop
  dispatched a prover that **created `SerreFiniteness.lean` from scratch** and proved a substantial layer.
  Treat the plan's no-dispatch note as stale.
- **Sorry count:** file new; 12 scaffolded ‚Üí **7 final** (lines 71, 95, 120, 136, 152, 181, 194). Build green
  (no errors). No `axiom` decls. blueprint-doctor: CLEAN.
- **Targets:** scaffold whole S2 chapter + close the assembly/induction layer.

## What was proven (axiom-clean ‚Äî verified via `lean_verify`, only propext/Classical.choice/Quot.sound)
- **`HModule_flasque_one_subsingleton`** (new helper, L216) ‚Äî `Subsingleton` strengthening of the public
  `HModule_flasque_one_eq_zero`. **CRITICAL SUCCESS: this used the CLEAN i=1 route and AVOIDED the S5-gated
  general `HModule_flasque_eq_zero` sorry** (the central hazard the whole iter pivoted on). I personally
  re-verified `#print axioms` ‚Üí no `sorryAx`. Body: injective-hull SES + `ext_one_eq_zero_of_hom_surjective_of_injective`
  + flasque section-surjectivity lifted through `constantSheafAdj`.
- **`HModule_skyscraper_finite`** (L269, both degrees) ‚Äî deg 0 re-derives the private (unusable)
  `RRFormula.H0_skyscraperSheaf_finrank_eq_one` 4-step linear-equiv chain landing in `kÃÑ`; deg 1 via the
  new subsingleton helper. `rw [if_pos] <;> first | infer_instance | trivial` handles `P.point ‚àà ‚ä§`.
- **`HModule_finite_of_ses`** (L323, middle-term 2-of-3) ‚Äî covariant Ext-LES
  (`Abelian.Ext.covariant_sequence_exact‚ÇÇ`) + sandwich closed by `Module.Finite.of_submodule_quotient`
  (found via leansearch: `ker g = range f` finite, quotient ‚âÖ range g ‚äÜ finite `H‚Å±(F‚ÇÉ)`).
- **`HModule_finite_X‚ÇÅ_of_ses`** (new helper, L377, left-term 2-of-3) ‚Äî verified axiom-clean. `i=0` mono‚áíinj;
  `i=j+1` window via `covariant_sequence_exact‚ÇÅ`, same sandwich.

## Assembly/induction layer ‚Äî bodies COMPLETE, carry `sorryAx` transitively (verified)
`HModule_structureSheaf_H1_finite`, `HModule_structureSheaf_finite`, `sheafOf_finite_single_add_aux`
(`Int.induction_on` on the coefficient), `sheafOf_finite_of_le_one` (`Finsupp.induction` on `D`),
`HModule_linearEquiv_of_iso` (new, local copy of private RRFormula transport), and the **headline producer
`HModule_sheafOf_finite`** (L577 ‚Äî feeds RRFormula's four S2 `FiniteDimensional` sorries). All compile; all
bottom out at the 7 leaves (`lean_verify HModule_sheafOf_finite` ‚Üí `sorryAx` present, as expected).
Tactical lessons: divisor reassociation needs `congrArg(‚Ä¶).mpr` (plain `rw` fails on the
`WeilDivisor`-vs-`Finsupp` `+`/`single` instance head); skyscraper finiteness transported through the SES iso
via `key.equiv e.symm` (dot-notation + `exact` full-defeq ‚Äî instance synth fails on the `Classical`
decidability head mismatch).

## CRITICAL FINDING ‚Äî `HModule_affine_acyclic` (L71) is UNSOUND AS TYPED (must-fix)
Both review subagents independently flagged the same defect (reports:
`task_results/lean-auditor-serre025.md`, `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-serre025.md`):
- Signature quantifies over an **arbitrary** sheaf `F` of kÃÑ-modules with **no quasi-coherence hypothesis**;
  the only side condition `hAffine : ‚àÉ A, Nonempty (X ‚âÖ (Spec A).toTopCat)` is a **purely topological**
  homeomorphism (constrains `X`, not `F`). Hartshorne III.3.5 is **false** without quasi-coherence (a
  non-qcoh sheaf on `Spec A` can carry nonzero `H·µñ`), so the leaf **cannot be closed honestly**.
- The docstring (L67‚Äì70) carries an **excuse-comment** falsely claiming qcoh is "carried abstractly by
  `hAffine`/`hp`" ‚Äî neither encodes quasi-coherence.
- **Blast radius:** load-bears `HModule_structureSheaf_higher_vanish`, `HModule_sheafOf_higher_vanish`,
  `HModule_one_iso_cechH1` ‚Üí 5 downstream decls can never de-sorryfy until re-typed. NOT protected ‚Üí repairable.
- **Action taken:** added a `% NOTE:` to `lem:HModule_affine_acyclic` in the chapter flagging the missing
  qcoh predicate + the topological-only witness + the blocked downstream decls.

## Secondary subagent findings
- **Major (blueprint mapping):** `HModule_finite_of_ses` formalizes only the **middle-term** direction; the
  blueprint `lem:HModule_finite_of_ses` claims the full 2-of-3. The left direction lives in the unreferenced
  helper `HModule_finite_X‚ÇÅ_of_ses`. Chapter should split the block / reference both.
- **Major (data-sorry cluster):** `cechH1OfTwoAffine` (L120) is a `:= sorry` def (opaque junk object);
  `cechH1_finiteDimensional`/`HModule_one_iso_cechH1` prove properties of it ‚Üí the chain cannot be
  de-sorryed piecemeal (vacuous-proof risk). Must resolve together, after the affine-acyclic fix.
- **Minor:** 3√ó deprecated `CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val` (‚Üí `ObjectProperty.obj`) inside
  `HModule_flasque_one_subsingleton` (L240/243/247); module-header overstates completeness;
  `exists_two_affine_open_cover` adds an `IsAffineOpen (U‚äìV)` conjunct not in the blueprint statement (true
  strengthening ‚Äî chapter could record it).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_SerreFiniteness.tex`, `lem:HModule_affine_acyclic`: added `% NOTE:` (iter-025) ‚Äî current Lean
  signature drops the quasi-coherence hypothesis and is unprovable as typed; chapter must pin a `Module kÃÑ`
  qcoh predicate before the leaf can be corrected.

### Marker NON-override (judgment recorded)
- `RiemannRoch_OCofP.tex`, `lem:H1_vanishing_lineBundleAtClosedPoint_genusZero` (L595): the planner flagged
  its `\leanok` as a "sync mislabel" on a bare-`sorry` Lean decl. **Examined ‚Äî NO override made.** The
  `\leanok` is a **statement-block** marker (positioned inside `\begin{lemma}`, before `\label`), which per
  the marker vocabulary correctly means "declaration is formalized (‚â• a `sorry` present)". `h1_vanishing_genusZero`
  (OCofP L1147) does exist with a `sorry` body, so the statement marker is legitimate. The **proof block**
  (`\begin{proof}‚Ä¶\end{proof}`) correctly carries **no** `\leanok`, so the DAG does not treat the proof as
  done ‚Äî no laundering. Removing the statement `\leanok` would be incorrect. sync_leanok iter=25 only touched
  `Cohomology_SerreFiniteness.tex`, so this OCofP marker was untouched and is fine as-is.

## Coverage debt (5 unmatched `lean_aux` ‚Äî for the planner to blueprint)
`archon dag-query unmatched` confirms 5 new SerreFiniteness helpers with no blueprint block ‚Äî see
recommendations.md.

## Recommendations
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: fix `HModule_affine_acyclic`'s signature (chapter-pin qcoh predicate
first) BEFORE any prover targets the higher-vanish chain; cleanest standalone next lane is
`exists_two_affine_open_cover`.
